data.body: Implement Codex on top of the shared interactive session protocol instead of forcing all Codex work through . Choose a stable interactive invocation path, keep stdin open for follow-up turns, normalize Codex stream events into the shared event model, and make turn completion/session completion feed the same post-exit workflow validation used for Claude. The implementation should preserve non-interactive Codex execution where appropriate, but support claimed-step sessions and take-loop retries through interactive Codex sessions.
data.title: Add interactive Codex session support
